---
title: "Assessement Test"
author: "Iyenoma Goodnews Osabuohien 26001003"
date: "2026-02-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
contents <- read.csv("../data/contents.csv")
```



```{r}

# Pearson correlation coefficient
cor(contents$X, contents$Y, method = "pearson")


```
```{r}
cor.test(contents$X, contents$Y)

```
```{r}
plot(contents$X, contents$Y,
     xlab = "X",
     ylab = "Y",
     main = "Scatter plot of X vs Y")

```

## R Markdown


```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots
